name: google-ads-general
description: Google Ads GENERAL deliverables for Inbound CPH: standalone outputs that aren't tied to building or tuning a single campaign. ads-audit-report (full paid-search audit to a polished HTML slide deck + rendered PDF), ads-changelog (build a changelog/optimeringslog entry from Google Ads' own change-history — per client, or per specialist across their accounts — collapse bulk uploads, format-matched draft to paste into the client's Drive changelog), editor-csv-export (convert a confirmed Google Ads review workbook into the per-entity Google Ads Editor import CSVs — reads BOTH dialects on one contract: the campaign-build assembler workbook AND the optimization-loop review workbook; Editor imports CSV only, not .xlsx; pure transform, re-runs the no-Broad + length guards, never pushes to the account). All read-only against Google Ads (recommend-only, never writes to the account). For building NEW campaigns see google-ads-setup; for live-account tuning see google-ads-optimization. Danish-default.

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
